chapter_title.en: Chapter on Supplications Recommended for the Traveler Upon Departure

text: 2415 - وَ كَانَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِذَا أَرَادَ سَفَراً قَالَ -: « اَللَّهُمَّ خَلِّ سَبِيلَنَا وَ أَحْسِنْ تَسْيِيرَنَا وَ أَعْظِمْ عَافِيَتَنَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2415 - When Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) intended to travel, he would say:
"O Allah (swt), make our path clear, improve our journey, and grant us immense well-being."
